text: This article tries to explain the different historical contexts. The article links each context to the next context. The article also links each context to the centre point of the resurrection of Jesus Christ. The centre point appears in question and answer 45 of the Heidelberg Catechism. The aim is not only to find the true meaning of the Heidelberg Catechism in the question and answer, but also to explain the thinking behind the interpretation of the Heidelberg Catechism. The aim also brings to the surface and explains different ideas that regular church members see as a strange result of a new way. Different ways of interpreting lead to different understandings – sometimes very far apart. Die artikel begin by die sentrale punt van die opstanding van Jesus Christus in vraag en antwoord 45 van die Heidelbergse Kategismus. Die artikel brei uit na ’n nadenke oor die verskillende verwante historiese kontekste. Die artikel wil die leser help om die opstanding van Jesus Christus beter te verstaan in elke historiese konteks. Die doel is nie slegs om die ware betekenis te vind van wat die Heidelbergse Kategismus in genoemde vraag en antwoord poog om weer te gee nie, maar ook om die onderliggende hermeneutiese denke te verduidelik en alternatiewe aannames, wat gewone Christen-kerkgangers as ’n vreemde en verskillende benaderings ervaar, na die oppervlakte te bring en te verduidelik. Verskillende hermeneutiese prosesse lei tot verskillende uitkomste van verstaan – soms wêrelde van mekaar verwyderd.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
